    ExcelFormulaApplier
    Placeholder for applying spreadsheet-style formulas to evaluated values manually.

    FinancialFormulaService
     
    GenerateBalanceSheetAction
     
    GenerateIncomeStatementAction
     
    GenerateReportsAction
    GenerateReportsAction prompts the user to choose a report type, date range, and output format, then generates the specified report using the ReportService.
    GenerateTrialBalanceAction
    GenerateTrialBalanceAction prompts the user to enter a date range and output format, then generates a trial balance report using the configured ReportService.

    InputFileAction
     
    LoadXlsmTableAction
     
    OutputFileAction
    Opens a file chooser to select an output file location.

    A ReaderIntf can read double-entries from a persistent store.
